scene_summary: A minimal expressionist black-glass audio-machine cutaway sits across a pale concrete field, interrupted by oversized white mask strokes and a mint diagonal backplane. The strongest source windows are the long glass chamber, the cropped white mask, the mint diagonal plane, the yellow-green lane, a token notch, small side-tunnel glows, and compact light/pinhole marks along the machine edge.
usable_surfaces: oversized cropped white foreground mask strokes

detected_objects.label: hero central glass plate-section chamber
detected_objects.visual_evidence: The broad transparent glass cutaway spans the machine center, with visible tiled rear wall, metal posts, shelves, and piano-roll-like internal strata.

detected_objects.label: hero oversized white mask crossing chamber
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Oversized crisp white cropped glyph-like mask strokes cross behind and in front of the chamber, including a top bar, right curve, bottom L, and left arc.

detected_objects.label: pale mint diagonal backplane
detected_objects.visual_evidence: A pale mint translucent diagonal plane washes across the concrete background and continues through the glass chamber wall.

detected_objects.label: Primary Source Anchor
detected_objects.visual_evidence: The left half of the black top lid is a dominant source-bearing edge, with two circular sockets and a long dark glass-like strip.

detected_objects.label: Layered Fragment
detected_objects.visual_evidence: A stepped stack of pale blocks and shelves rises along the right interior ramp, forming a layered physical fragment inside the chamber.

detected_objects.label: retro side-tunnel thumbnail glow
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Planned source surface fallback used because plate inspection returned fewer mapped objects than source bindings.

complexity_assessment.rationale: The plate is sparse and architectural: one long black machine, one glass chamber, one pale diagonal wash, and oversized white mask strokes. Detail is concentrated in tight slits, pinholes, and chamber strata rather than cluttering the full field.

mapping_note: Package assembly filled unmapped source pockets from planned artifact surfaces because plate inspection returned too few detected objects.
